subtasks.description: Get vendor risk scores by querying vendor reliability data, then classify each vendor as low_risk, medium_risk, or high_risk based on incident history.

plan.cost_rationale: Simple task — Haiku classifier, small tier

output.sql: SELECT vendor_name, COUNT(invoice_id) as total_invoices, COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'paid' THEN 1 END) as paid_invoices, COUNT(CASE WHEN status IN ('overdue', 'disputed') THEN 1 END) as incident_count, ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'paid' THEN 1 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(invoice_id), 0), 2) as payment_rate, CASE WHEN COUNT(CASE WHEN status IN ('overdue', 'disputed') THEN 1 END) = 0 THEN 'low_risk' WHEN COUNT(CASE WHEN status IN ('overdue', 'disputed') THEN 1 END) <= 2 THEN 'medium_risk' ELSE 'high_risk' END as risk_classification FROM invoice_facts GROUP BY vendor_name ORDER BY incident_count DESC, vendor_name ASC
